channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Low hanging overgrown branches obstructing views for motorists at the intersection of Chesham Ave and Oxhawth crescent., 9th July
item.description:
The obstruction from the overgrowth tress on the grass verge is causing motorists at the intersection of Oxhawth Cress and Chesham Ave, to venture beyond the road marking to check for oncoming traffic. It’s become like this since late spring early summer…

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicle still here after a month, 9th July
item.description:
This dumped waste vehicle still here on public road having been reported but no feed back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Wyncham Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th July
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Simnel Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lady left unwanted items outside our garage, 9th July
item.description:
A couple weeks back, boxes of unwanted items were left in between garages of houses 2 and 3 on Nuthatch Gardens. This is blocking the garage doors and is unsightly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nuthatch Gardens, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Idling vehicle, 9th July
item.description:
White van has been idling outside on Drury Lane at the corner with Martlett Court for longer than 20 minutes with its lights on,

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Feeds overgrown allover asylum road, 8th July
item.description:
There are weeds everywhere, the pavements needs to be better looked after

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Asylum Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over Asylum Road persists, 8th July
item.description:
Our pavement is persists to be full of litter, it's disgusting, it is clean not often enough and there are no bins for people to throw litter anywhere else but on the street. It's also full of weeds. The pavement is also all broken and my children cannot walk safely having to avoid litter, broken glasses and large cracks and overgrown tree roots.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Asylum Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the bins, 8th July
item.description:
Bbq drum and construction waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Denmark Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Bins not collected, 8th July
item.description:
The refuse collection for waste has not been collected. This is the second time. RB Greenwich website online form for reporting issue does not work.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sweyn Place, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Intermittent Clicking Noise, 8th July
item.description:
We’ve noticed an intermittent clicking/crackling noise outside in the evenings. It seems to be coming from the ground floor or parking area, although we can’t pinpoint the source. Could you please check it’s nothing electrical or unsafe?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bentley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th July
item.description:
We have seen fly tipping and people have left a sofa. This is not the first time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Vale, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping rubbish, 8th July
item.description:
Builder dumped his rubbish around our bins again this time I video it. He had the cheek to use a wheelbarrow

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone is often litter picking in front of my house, 8th July
item.description:
Someone is often litter picking in front of my house during the night (around 10/11 PM) causing a lot of noise. The location is the intersection between innes street and chandler way, where the common bins are situated. I've noticed this issue for a few weeks now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innes Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two cars parked both sides of double yellow of road, 8th July
item.description:
Two cars parked both sides of double yellow line of road and they are blocking the road for access. The van driver (HY22 TNL) refused to move to give acces

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornton Street, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several clothes left for a long period, 8th July
item.description:
Clothes have been left there for a long time and currently getting dirtier with foxes and other garbage pilling up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 256, Croxted Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple vans blocking entrance to Lydford ksss, 8th July
item.description:
Multiple vans blocking the only vehicle access to Lydford close despite clear signage. This is a potentially a hazard in the event emergency vehicles need access as well as blocking resident access. Probably associated with an event at earth.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79a, Choumert Road, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th July
item.description:
